rotation.reason: Rotation cards require a reviewed semantic-distance pass over baseline/current declared state plus app-safe evidence. The deterministic public bundle does not create those judgments.
required_inputs: reviewed app-safe evidence cards or public progress artifacts
model judgment with provenance and review_status

policy.app_surface: Cohort app may render generated cards with generated/review status visible.
policy.public_web: Public web should exclude cards unless surface_tier is public and approval_state is approved.
policy.rotation: Do not generate or publish named-team rotation judgments without reviewed model provenance.
